allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=37816 OR ProcessId=43268" | ForEach-Object { $pp = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.ParentProcessId\)"; [PSCustomObject]@{CmdPID=$_.ProcessId; GPID=$pp.ProcessId; GName=$pp.Name; GCmd=\($pp.CommandLine | ForEach-Object { if\($_\){$_.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(250,$_.Length\)\)} }\) } } | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=30332" | Select-Object ProcessId,ParentProcessId,CommandLine | Format-List; Write-Host "---parents up the chain---"; $pid1=\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=30332"\).ParentProcessId; for \($i=0; $i -lt 5 -and $pid1; $i++\){ $p=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$pid1"; if\(-not $p\){break}; Write-Host "PID=$\($p.ProcessId\) Name=$\($p.Name\) Cmd=$\($p.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(250,$p.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)"; $pid1=$p.ParentProcessId })
